config.html:
Scaffold từ DQHF — form gốc: frm_Dao_dondathang, frmChiPhiDonHang, frmTheoDoiDonHangPhoi2
Nút WinForms gốc: (không)
Nút cần gắn thêm: Xoá (procedure/records.delete) · In (cần print template entity) · Xuất (export)
Proc cần port: HR_CONGTY_GET, TR_BIEUMAU_FRIDAY_GETBYREPORTID, TR_DONDATHANG_GET3, TR_DONDATHANG_NEWID, TR_DONDATHANG_NEWID2, TR_CHIPHI_DONHANGTRANG, TR_DONDATHANG_GETLISTHTR, TR_DONDATHANG_PHOI_GIACONG
Entity phụ (lookup/filter cân nhắc thêm): tr_dexuat_bangmau, tr_hehang, tr_khachhang, tr_material, tr_order, tr_order_replacement, tr_phieuyeucau, tr_phieuyeucau_chitiet, tr_phieuyeucau_muahang, tr_phieuyeucau_muahang_chitiet, tr_site
